JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.title: Inner Star Map
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.description:
Jiang Xiao Exclusive. Core Relic.
Gain Skill Points upon victory (Normal/Event +1250, Elite +2500, Boss +5000).
Currently possess [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points.
(Upon obtaining this relic, automatically acquire the Star Map, Star Technique Quality, and Star Power Level relics.)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.flavor: A mystical Star Map residing within the mind—the very origin of Jiang Xiao's journey as the Toxic Healer.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.title: Star Power
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.descriptio:
Current Star Power Level: [gold]{level:choose(1|2|3|4|5|6):Stardust Stage|Nebula Stage|Star River Stage|Star Sea Stage|Starry Sky Stage|Star's End Stage}[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain [gold]{energy}[/gold] Energy.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.flavor: Star power surges like the tides; the lighting of every single star signifies a qualitative leap forward.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.title: Star Skill Quality
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.descript:
Current Quality: [gold]{rank:choose(1|2|3|4|5|6|7):Bronze|Silver|Gold|Platinum|Diamond|Candle Moon|Scorching Sun}[/gold].
Card effects increased by {multiplier}%.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.flavor: Quality dictates the purity of Star Power. From Bronze to Scorching Sun, it is the yawning chasm that separates mortals from gods.
